top_signals.title: Palm Oil Posts Biggest Drop in a Month as Crude Erases War Gains
top_signals.summary: Palm oil futures posted the biggest drop in more than a month, tracking declines in crude and soy oil prices, while a strengthening ringgit added to demand headwinds.

top_signals.title: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
top_signals.summary: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

top_signals.title: Micron is tech's new margin king as memory crisis pushes company past Nvidia and Meta
top_signals.summary: Micron said in its earnings report that its gross margin jumped to 84.9% from 39% a year ago.

top_signals.title: Micron Revives AI Trade; SK Hynix Seeks US Listing | The Asia Trade 6/25/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Micron stock jumps 15% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
top_signals.summary: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.
